TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, PLFF NOT PRESENT. SON OF PLFF IN COURT TODAY & NOT AN ATTY.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DARN, GARDENIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DARN, GARDENIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 166 TURK STREET #11, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102 $1,050.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,050.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT VACATES BY 5PM AND RET KEYS IN A TIMELY MANNER ON JUNE 15, 1995, THEN BACK RENT IS WAIVED AND DEBT IS DEEMED SATISFIED. $ 350 PAID IN COURT BY STIP. BOTH SIDES TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES.
